description: Generic contdition that can be added by contollers to provide additional information about the state of a resource.

reason.description: Contains a programmatic identifier indicating the reason for the condition's last transition. Producers of specific condition types may define expected values and meanings for this field, and whether the values are considered a guaranteed API. The value should be a CamelCase string. This field may not be empty.

message.description: Human readable message indicating details about the transition.

lastTransitionTime.description: Time when condition transitioned from one status to another.

observedGeneration.description: Resource generation that was last processed by the controller that added this condition.
